title: Lucid Run Receipt
description: A signed receipt for an AI inference execution. Contains all information needed for verification, audit, and dispute resolution. Extended for Fluid Compute v0.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution run

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the receipt was created

trace_id.description: Optional trace ID for distributed tracing

policy_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the policy that governed this execution

model_passport_id.description: Passport ID of the model used

compute_passport_id.description: Passport ID of the compute provider

compute_offer_passport_id.description: On-chain ComputeOfferPassport ID (Solana PDA). Links execution to specific compute offer for verifiable matching.

model_revision.description: Model revision (commit SHA or tag) for auditability. For HF models: commit SHA or revision tag.

model_hash.description: Hash of the model weights/files used

execution_mode.description: Execution mode used. byo_runtime = full attestation, managed_endpoint = limited attestation, runpod_serverless = container-controlled serverless execution

job_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the job request (binds input to output)

quote_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the quote that authorized this execution

node_id.description: Identifier of the worker node that executed the job

runtime_hash.description: Docker image digest of the execution runtime. MUST be null for managed_endpoint mode.

gpu_fingerprint.description: GPU hardware fingerprint. MUST be null for managed_endpoint mode. For byo_runtime: specific hardware ID. For runpod_serverless: GPU type only (e.g., 'NVIDIA A10G').

capacity_bucket.description: Capacity bucket name (runpod_serverless mode). Maps to YAML-defined endpoint configuration.

endpoint_id.description: RunPod endpoint ID (runpod_serverless mode). This is the trust boundary / compute passport.

billing.description: Billing details for cost transparency (runpod_serverless mode)

outputs_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the canonical JSON output

output_ref.description: URI to stored output (S3 or IPFS). Format: 's3://bucket/path' or 'ipfs://Qm...'

input_ref.description: Optional URI to stored input (for enterprise audit trail)

error_code.description: Structured error code if execution failed

error_message.description: Human-readable error message if execution failed

ttft_ms.description: Time to first token in milliseconds

queue_wait_ms.description: Time spent waiting in queue (legacy, use queue_time_ms for runpod_serverless)

queue_time_ms.description: Time spent in queue before worker picked up job (runpod_serverless)

cold_start_ms.description: Cold start time if worker was scaled from zero (runpod_serverless). 0 = warm worker.

model_load_ms.description: Time spent loading model (0 if cache hit)

cache_hit.description: Whether the model was already loaded in cache

receipt_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the canonical JSON receipt body

signer_pubkey.description: ed25519 public key of the signer

signer_type.description: Type of entity that signed this receipt

chain.description: Blockchain where this receipt is anchored

root.description: Merkle root that includes this receipt

epoch_id.description: Epoch ID this receipt was anchored in
